address: 1316 Dakota Ave, St Cloud, FL 34769, USA
headline: We’ll tell you straight what your car needs—and make it look new again.
soul_lead: A transparent, hands-on St. Cloud detailing shop where Papa Lou treats every vehicle like a personal project, prioritizing honest assessments and visible transformations over upsells.
services: Inspects every vehicle before quoting to avoid unnecessary upsells
Specializes in heavy interior restoration and paint correction/ceramic coating
Bilingual, relationship-driven service built on straight talk
Relies on documented before/after results over polished marketing

reviews.name: Triple A
reviews.text: Incredible work, extremely professional and very accommodating.  They went above and beyond my expectations. I strongly recommend them for any detailing service you may need. They detailed the inside seats of my mothers car that were beyond filthy.. see photos for beginning and e

reviews.name: Todd Dunn
reviews.text: I have been coming to Papa Lou’s for over a year now he does amazing work my car comes in looking old and when he is finished it looks new. He is an ho man he will tell you straight if you need something or if yiu don’t. He is fair with his pricing and will always want to look at

reviews.name: Lee Ortiz
reviews.text: Best car detailing in the St. Cloud area! Auto detailing, ceramic coating, headlight restoration, paint correction, paint decontamination. He does it all!  Very professional, super detailed, great service, affordable pricing. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: NELLY
reviews.text: Luis was amazing!! Did a wonderful job, honest and hardworking man! Communicates perfect and gives you the right price for what needs to be done. Es el mejor!!!

reviews.name: Skate Reflections
reviews.text: Papa Lou does excellent work and really nice to talk with… I will be bringing all my vehicles to his shop.
